overall.description: Third-person game footage showing an armored character walking through a desolate, sepia-toned rocky wasteland along a shoreline. The character moves steadily forward through scattered boulders with dark overcast skies, while reflective water becomes visible on the right side as the journey progresses.

agents.ego_description: character walking steadily through scattered rocks in a barren wasteland environment

entered.detail: scattered boulders and rocks on the left side of the frame
scattered boulders and rocks on the right side of the frame
cluster of rocks visible on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: The character begins walking through a desolate, sepia-toned rocky desert landscape. Scattered boulders line both sides of the path while distant rock formations are visible on the horizon under a dark overcast sky.

events.description: reflective water shoreline becomes visible on the right side of the frame

agents.ego_description: character continuing forward along the shoreline, approaching large rock formations

entered.detail: reflective water surface appearing on the right side, indicating a shoreline
prominent cluster of large boulders directly ahead in the path
single large boulder near the water's edge on the right

segments.scene_description: As the character progresses, a reflective water shoreline becomes visible on the right. The character approaches and passes a large cluster of boulders in the center of the path while the terrain opens up to reveal the coastal environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky shoreline approaching dense boulder field

events.description: character passes the large rock formation on the right, moving deeper along the shore

agents.ego_description: character walking along the shoreline toward a dense field of rocks ahead

entered.detail: dense cluster of boulders and rock formations appearing on the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the shoreline, passing the large rock formations previously on the right. The water remains visible in the distance on the right as the character approaches a dense field of boulders ahead, with scattered rocks now appearing on the left side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate, sepia-toned rocky wasteland that gradually opens up to reveal a reflective coastal shoreline. It begins with the character walking through a desert landscape of scattered boulders and distant rock formations under a dark overcast sky. As the character progresses, the terrain expands to the right, introducing a shimmering waterline that parallels the path. The scene then shifts as the character passes a large central cluster of boulders, moving deeper into the coastal environment where the water remains a constant presence. Finally, the camera follows the character toward a dense field of boulders ahead, with scattered rocks now appearing on both sides of the path.
